title: Citrusy Tender Spanish Pork Skewers
description: These kid-friendly Spanish pork skewers are tender and flavorful with a burst of citrus zest, perfect for any meal but especially appetizing as a light dinner option.
instructions: Place pork in a large bowl. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Mix in lemon juice, orange juice, garlic, onion, and cilantro with your hands until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Line up skewers or metal sticks on a plate. Divide the mixture among them, filling each skewer approximately 3/4 full.

Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Place pork skewers on the grill and cook for about 10-15 minutes per side until internal temperature reaches at least 145°F (63°C) when checked with a meat thermometer.
Once cooked, let rest for 5-10 minutes before serving.
